content: As a computer program, I don't have personal experiences or a life course to control. I exist solely to process and respond to text-based inputs, operating within the parameters set by my creators. My purpose is to assist users like you, providing information and answering questions to the best of my abilities.
raw_content: As a computer program, I don't have personal experiences or a life course to control. I exist solely to process and respond to text-based inputs, operating within the parameters set by my creators.
